_publications._publicationTitle: Transient inhibition of the ERK pathway prevents cerebellar developmental defects and improves long-term motor functions in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: many of the prematurely differentiated neurons in the ML of the P8 Nf1 Math1 CKO cerebellum expressed Tbr2, a marker specific for UBCs in the cerebellum
details: Specifically marks UBCs in cerebellum, distinguishing between Tbr2+ NeuN+ and Tbr2high NeuN- UBC sublineages
